title: SigningBackend::sign: aws-kms returns DER, local-signing/pkcs11 return raw (r||s)
description: aws-kms returns DER-encoded ECDSA signatures per AWS docs ('DER-encoded ASN.1 structure containing r and s'). local-signing (via p256::ecdsa::Signature::to_bytes()) and pkcs11 (CKM_ECDSA_SHA256) both return raw 64-byte (r||s). Any caller who writes p256::ecdsa::Signature::from_bytes(sig_bytes) will succeed on local-signing/pkcs11 and fail on aws-kms. The integration tests for aws-kms only check !sig.is_empty() so this was not caught. SigningBackend::sign() doc says 'Returns raw signature bytes' — aws-kms violates that contract.
